incorrect.source_says: Matrigel is the animal-derived reagent the paper REPLACES; the xeno-free protocol uses CELLstart as the chosen EB-attachment substrate. Matrigel is present only as the standard-protocol comparator.
incorrect.evidence_quote: On day 7, EBs were adhered to Matrigel™ (Corning; Cat#354234 – standard protocol) or the following xeno-free substrates: CELLstart™ ... After initial testing of all substrates (Fig. 1), further experiments were done with CELLstart.
incorrect.source_loc: Methods, 'Xeno-free derivation of iPSC-derived retinal organoids'

incorrect.source_says: EBs are generated from day 0 (iPSCs lifted with ReLeSR); BMP4 is added on day 6 and EBs are adhered on day 7. Day 6 is not the EB stage start/end; the schematic marks Day 0 'Lift iPSCs' and Day 7 'Adhere EBs'.
incorrect.evidence_quote: To generate embryoid bodies (EBs), iPSCs were lifted using ReLeSR™ ... On day 6, NIM was supplemented with 1.5 nM rhBMP4 ... On day 7, EBs were adhered
incorrect.source_loc: Methods + Fig.4A/Fig.1A schematic (Day 0 Lift iPSCs; Day 7 Adhere EBs)

recall_misses.source_says: Core RDM supplement; not in media_supplements.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: RDM - DMEM/F12 (3:1), 2% B27 supplement (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#17504044)

recall_misses.item: KnockOut Serum Replacement (KSR), 10% (xeno-free FBS substitute in 3D-RDM)
recall_misses.source_says: The xeno-free replacement for FBS in the GMP protocol; missed entirely.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: xeno-free 3D-RDM (RDM plus 10% FBS (as per our standard protocol) or 10% KnockOut™ Serum Replacement (KSR; Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#10828028)
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods, 3D-RDM composition; Fig.2A schematic (FBS vs KSR)

recall_misses.item: CELLstart (xeno-free EB-attachment matrix actually used in main protocol)
recall_misses.source_says: The chosen xeno-free substrate; should be the primary matrix, not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: further experiments were done with CELLstart

recall_misses.source_says: iPSC plating substrate; absent from matrix/supplements.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: iPSCs were cultured on recombinant human rhlaminin 521 coated cell culture plates in E8 medium
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods, iPSC culture / 'rhlaminin 521 (5 µg/ml; Biolamina; Cat#LN521-02)'

recall_misses.item: DMEM/F12 base medium for NIM (1:1) and RDM (3:1)
recall_misses.source_says: Base medium of differentiation media; only E8 captured as base_media, differentiation base media missed.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Neural Induction Medium (NIM- DMEM/F12 (1:1) ...); RDM - DMEM/F12 (3:1)

recall_misses.item: Concentrations of captured supplements (FBS 10%, Primocin 0.2%, N2 1%, NEAA 1%, Glutamax 1%, heparin 2 µg/mL, taurine 100 µM, lipid concentrate 1:1000, all-trans retinoic acid 1 µM)
recall_misses.source_says: All concentrations are null in extraction although the source states each dose verbatim.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 10% Fetal Bovine Serum; 0.2% Primocin; 1% N2 supplement; 1% non-essential amino acids; 1% Glutamax; 2 µg/mL heparin; 100 µM taurine; 1:1000 chemically defined lipid concentrate; 1 µM all-trans retinoic acid

recall_misses.item: BMP4 gradual withdrawal over 7 days (timeline detail)
recall_misses.evidence_quote: BMP4 was gradually transitioned out of the NIM over seven days

notes: Multimodal: Fig.1A, Fig.2A and Fig.4A are protocol-timeline schematics (FBM→E8→NIM/BMP4 day6-7→RDM day16→3DRDM day30→day100→3DRDM- day160+) consistent with the methods text. Extracted factor/cell/passaging calls and most named supplements are CORRECT (rhBMP4 1.5 nM, ReLeSR, iPSC/human, E8). Two issues: (1) matrix is reported as Matrigel, but Matrigel is the reagent the paper REPLACES; CELLstart is the xeno-free substrate actually used, and KSR replaces FBS — the extraction captured the legacy/comparator reagents rather than the paper's headline xeno-free protocol; (2) the EB timeline window is imprecise. Recall is the main weakness: every supplement concentration is null despite verbatim doses in text, and B27, KSR, CELLstart, rhlaminin 521, and the DMEM/F12 base media were missed. assay_endpoints align with figures (OTX2, RCVRN/recoverin, cone arrestin=ARR3). Tables list empty in bundle; supplementary (Table S1/S2 in .docx) not fetched, so antibody/donor detail unverifiable.
